message:
fix(codegen): Use PyValue.eql() for uncertain types in assertEqual

Route uncertain types (.pyvalue, .unknown) to PyValue.from().eql()
instead of anytype assertEqualGeneric to reduce monomorphization:

- Add is_uncertain check before generic fallback in genAssertEqual
- When type_a or type_b is .pyvalue/.unknown, wrap with PyValue.from()
- Update tuple comparison to use PyValue.from().eql() directly

This compiles ONCE regardless of call count, instead of monomorphizing
for each unique type combination at call sites. Same pattern as the
list/set/dict PV API changes in previous commits.
